descriptionByLocale.it:
LWP Ledermann Wieting & Partners pubblica questa opportunita nel suo portale Ticino. La descrizione completa del ruolo e stata estratta dal PDF ufficiale del mandato. Sede indicativa: Lugano. On behalf of our important client, we are searching the following profile: FULL STACK DEVELOPER Skills:
• University Degree in Computer Science or similar
• At least 3 years of experience as IT Engineer
• Knowledge JS, HTML, CSS, React, Pug, Node Js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL Main Responsibilities:
• Designing and implementing Software
• Troubleshooting Company offers:
• An International business experience
• Flexible working hours
• Comfortable and informal environment
• Personal and professional growth You may apply to Anthony Mirenda (mirenda@lwphr.ch), our consultant in charge for the selection. No answer will be given to profiles not matching the requested requirements. PDF ufficiale: https://www.lwphr.ch/uploads/1/4/6/5/146598773/full_stack_developer.pdf
descriptionByLocale.en:

Indicative location: Lugano. On behalf of our important client, we are searching the following profile: FULL STACK DEVELOPER Skills:
